case_title: MILCA NOEMI TUMAX RAMIREZ VS. PAULINA BARRIOS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. THIS MATTER WAS ORIGINALLY CONTINUED TO DEC-2-19 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506. TO ALLOW FOR A SPANISH INTERPERTER. AFTER THE PARTIES WERE LET GO PLAINTIFF RETURNS TO COURT TO INFORM THE CLERK THE PARTIES HAVE SETTLED AND WANTS TO DISMISS THE CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED AUG-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, PAULINA
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
